task_completion.description: Open the raw MSA draft in ONLYOFFICE Document Editor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: ONLYOFFICE Document Editor is open and displaying the unformatted or partially formatted text of the Master Service Agreement.

task_completion.description: Center align the title 'MASTER SERVICE AGREEMENT'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main title 'MASTER SERVICE AGREEMENT' at the top of the document is centered horizontally on the page.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 1' style to the seven main numbered article headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main numbered article headers (e.g., Article 1, Article 2) are visibly styled as 'Heading 1' (typically larger, bold, and distinct from body text), or the 'Heading 1' style is highlighted in the ribbon when the cursor is on these headers.

task_completion.description: Apply 'Heading 2' style to the seven sub-section headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The sub-section headers (e.g., 1.1, 1.2) are styled as 'Heading 2' (distinct from Heading 1 and body text), or the 'Heading 2' style is highlighted in the ribbon when the cursor is on them.

task_completion.description: Justify align all standard body paragraphs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The body paragraphs have straight, flush edges on both the left and right margins, or the 'Justify' alignment button is active in the toolbar when a paragraph is selected.

task_completion.description: Bold the terms 'Confidential Information', 'Deliverables', and 'Effective Date'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specific terms 'Confidential Information', 'Deliverables', and 'Effective Date' appear in a bold font weight throughout the visible document text.

task_completion.description: Save the final document as formatted_msa_final.docx.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the file being saved as 'formatted_msa_final.docx' in the ~/Documents/TextDocuments/ directory, or the ONLYOFFICE window title bar displays 'formatted_msa_final.docx'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ONLYOFFICE Document Editor GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ONLYOFFICE graphical interface (ribbon, menus, dialogs) rather than terminal commands (like python-docx scripts or sed) being used to manipulate the file.

integrity.description: The agent used ONLYOFFICE Document Editor, not a different text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window clearly belongs to ONLYOFFICE (identifiable by its specific ribbon layout and branding), not LibreOffice, gedit, or nano.

integrity.description: Formatting was applied using word processor styles and alignment tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: Changes are reflected in the document's rich text rendering (actual bold text, actual centered text, actual heading styles) rather than markdown symbols (like **bold**) being typed into the document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input file: /home/ga/Documents/TextDocuments/raw_msa_draft.docx. Expected output file: /home/ga/Documents/TextDocuments/formatted_msa_final.docx. The document contains exactly 7 main numbered article headers (Heading 1) and 7 sub-section headers (Heading 2). The exact terms to be bolded are 'Confidential Information', 'Deliverables', and 'Effective Date'.
